title: Gentle Italian Custard Tagine
description: A creamy, slow-cooked Italian dessert inspired by Moroccan flavors. This gentle custard tagine is perfect for a relaxing evening.

ingredients.name: Saudi Tagine
ingredients.notes: Tagine spice blend or Moroccan spice mix

instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together the custard, sugar, and melted butter until smooth.
Add the eggs one at a time, whisking well after each addition.
Stir in the chilled heavy cream and vanilla extract.
Pour the mixture into 4-6 ramekins or small baking dishes.
Place the ramekins in a large baking dish and add hot water to come halfway up the sides.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the edges are set and the centers are still slightly jiggly.
Remove the ramekins from the water bath and let cool to room temperature.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Just before serving, sprinkle with gentle flower petals and a pinch of tagine spice blend.
